VERIFIED EXACT INSTANCE: n = 64, p = 193: 18,816 uncharged vs n^2 = 4,096 (charged = 992 = 32*31 exactly, matching the antipodal count). The trigger decreases in h (h = 2 is worst), so p >= n^2 kills the mechanism at every h; official rows sit 48.8 bits above the h = 2 trigger. The X-8 pigeonhole lesson, miniaturized and now built into the theorem's hypotheses as a nearly-sharp condition.

nodes.title: (A2): Laurent's theorem gives the n-UNIFORM char-0 count
nodes.statement: By Laurent's theorem (Lang's conjecture for tori, PROVED classical mathematics), the torsion points of W_h lie in finitely many torsion cosets contained in W_h. Contained torus cosets = the toral components = the fiber loci (X24/x83 geometrically). Hence char-0 non-fiber trades number <= C(h), UNIFORMLY IN n. Subsumes X24's classification and explains every empty sweep. NEEDS: the citation verification + an effective version (Evertse / Beukers-Smyth / Aliev-Smyth lineage) for explicit C(h) at h <= ~40. [CITATION NEEDED - stated from memory]
nodes.attack_surface: literature verification task (GPT-Pro-shaped: pull the effective-Laurent papers, extract the bound's shape in deg(W_h) and height)
nodes.falsifier: char-0 non-fiber trades growing with n at fixed h (the sweeps say no)
nodes.notes: DEMOTED req -> ev per the assembly's G2: at fixed n, X24 alone classifies the char-0 set (empty at window sizes) — Laurent is packaging for the n-uniform story, not load-bearing for closure.

nodes.title: (A3) THE ONE NEW LEMMA: good reduction of W_h's torsion structure
nodes.statement: For p outside a finite, h-only, row-independent exceptional set S(h) — primes dividing explicit nonzero integers (discriminants/resultants of W_h's non-toral components and torsion-coset membership data) — the mu_n(F_q)-points of W_h do not exceed the char-0 structure: no new trades appear mod p. This is the exceptional-prime phenomenon (F_193, the q-sweep non-monotonicity, X-6) in its proper algebro-geometric form. TWO EXITS: (i) bound S(h)'s defining integers below 2^128 (heights ~ exp(poly(h)): plausible at small h, unclear at h ~ 40); (ii) THE FALLBACK THAT ALWAYS WORKS: compute S(h)'s integers ONCE per h (row-independent, reusable), then per-row certification = GCD/divisibility tests — trivial arithmetic. x83's triangularity makes the eliminant chain computable. PROVED AT FIXED (n,h) (Fable agent, 14/14 replayed; biconditional validated at (16,3): exceptional set exactly {7,17,97} matching brute-force both directions). LEMMA 0 (structural): W_h is a GRAPH in coefficient space (O_j = P_j(c_h..c_{2h-1}) - c_j); anchored torsion intersection = rem(X^n - 1, S^2 - S(1)^2) = 0. D(n,h) pointwise-minimal + computable RUR-certificate integer (identity-checked; Rouillier provenance-only G1). Torsion rigidity elementary, both q = p^2 splits. CORRECTIONS: h-only n-uniformity PROVED FALSE (G4, quarantined); Laurent OFF the critical path (G2 — X24 suffices at fixed n, char-0 set EMPTY at window sizes). Gaps G1-G5 named; G5 = the pilot certificates (computation).

nodes.notes: PILOT RESULTS (7/7 replayed, every claim by two independent methods): obstructions built two ways byte-identical; isobaric weights confirmed; fiber vanishing verified. CHAR-0 CENSUS EXACT: h=4 non-toral torsion EMPTY at n = 16/32/64 (toral count exactly C(n/4,2)); h=5, h=6 entirely empty — X24 confirmed, no banked theorem contradicted. FEASIBILITY VERDICT (decisive NEGATIVE): the brute eliminant route to D(n,h) dies at n=32 (first elimination >150s; coefficient bits double per n-doubling: 9/22/51 at 16/32/64 => ~800+ bits at 1024); the census route is exact only to n ~ 64-128. THE (C1) COMPUTATION AS POSED IS INFEASIBLE AT n = 1024 FOR ALL h.

nodes.title: PROVED (roadmap-lane, toy-verified): the char-0 giant coset theorem
nodes.statement: Over characteristic zero: every 0/1 t-null vector on mu_n (n = 2^s) is a union of mu_M-cosets with M > t. ONE-PARAGRAPH PROOF (Fourier/Galois): the exponent polynomial f_B has INTEGER coefficients, so f_B(zeta^r) = 0 propagates to the full Galois orbit of zeta^r — all frequencies of the same 2-adic valuation; r in [1, t] realizes every valuation v <= log2(t), so B-hat vanishes at ALL r not divisible by 2^{v+1}-max = the first 2-power > t; hence B-hat is supported on MZ (M = 2^{ceil log2 t}+... the least 2-power > t) and the 0/1 indicator equals its fiber average => a coset union. Verified exhaustively at (n, t) = (16, 4): exactly the mu_8-cosets and their union. NOTE: even easier than X24 (0/1 giant beats signed small-h); the X-8 boundary blocks are FINITE-FIELD-ONLY objects, consistent (see b2's Frobenius gap). STANDALONE PACKET SHIPPED (9/9): full proof written; verifier uses exact cyclotomic arithmetic — full 2^16 brute at (16,4) plus exact rational-nullspace proofs of both directions at (16,4)/(32,4)/(32,8) (nullity = n/M, counts = 2^{n/M}).

nodes.title: THE LOOSE END the assembly surfaced: derive the h-window cap
nodes.statement: The 2 log2 n / (log2 n)^2 cap on trade sizes has NO in-repo derivation (proof-agent flag; assembly arithmetic verified at both 20 and 100). Trades can a priori have h up to A (~67 at Row C). RESOLUTIONS (any one): (i) extend (C1) certificates to h <= A (same machinery — x83/A3 apply at every h); (ii) a large-h emptiness lemma (first moment empty by hundreds of bits at h > 20; obstruction count grows with h); (iii) derive the true consumer cap from the list accounting. Must close before the assembly is complete. AUDIT VERDICT (Opus agent, 13/13 replayed): NO banked step caps the consumer at 2 log2 n — that number maps to no repo object. The only banked window is the frozen W3 v1 grammar (log2 n)^2 = 100, which is DEFINITIONAL (an uncharged exclusion, not an emptiness theorem) and sits BELOW the Row-C agreements A = 67/133/261 (rates 1/16, 1/8, 1/4). RESOLUTION ADOPTED: H_max := A — trades with h up to A enter the accounting; A3+X24 apply verbatim at every h; prize-max rows have empty windows and need nothing. PROVED EN ROUTE (all h, verified numerically): <= floor(n/h) partners per anchored core (value-set argument: L_Q = L_P - c with c in the value set of L_P on mu_n, Q -> c injective) — sharpens the h=3 cubic-cap argument uniformly. NEW FLAG: the exact star-PTE support bound (h <= A vs 2h <= A) is unpinned in-repo and changes the gap size — micro-lemma needed.

Covers the window's most exposed sizes (the smallest h dominate risk). DELIVERED (27-check verifier green; 13/13 fast-mode replayed): (1) EXACT COMPLETE census over REAL finite fields at n = 16/32/64/128/256 — zero non-toral h=4 trades, toral exactly C(n/4,2) at every scale (extends the pilot's char-0 emptiness to actual F_p, two octaves further); (2) a decisive DETECTION gate: at the exceptional prime F17 the pipeline finds all 120 genuine non-toral 4-trades — sensitivity proved, and it caught+fixed a sign-convention bug that would have silently blinded the fast path; (3) n = 1024: machinery validated, toral family certified (32640), exhaustive spot-slice clean; the FULL run honestly deferred (~18h and ~16GB unbucketed; e_1-bucketing fits 2GB) — unconditional n=1024 closure rests on the A3+X24 route with C1a as corroborating harness, or a future bucketed long run; (4) h = 5 measured INFEASIBLE (~2.2yr) — the descent (C1b) must carry h >= 5. nodes.title: C1b THE CORE: the descent-injection certificate (verified seed identity)
nodes.statement: VERIFIED SEED (sympy-exact): under the squaring pushforward A |-> A_2 (A_2(X^2) = (-1)^h A(X)A(-X)), a trade B = A + c maps to a BAND PAIR: B_2 - A_2 = ±(c(A(X)+A(-X)) + c^2) — Y-degree exactly floor(h/2). So level-n trades descend to level-n/2 band pairs (budget h/2, saturating in ~log h levels) — but ONLY log2(1024/64) = 4 LEVELS are needed to reach the exhaustively-censusable domain n = 64 (pilot-verified feasible). THE CERTIFICATE ALGORITHM: (i) enumerate band pairs at the bottom (n = 64, budget delta_4) — census machinery extended; (ii) for each bottom candidate, check lift-compatibility up the 4 levels (each root has 2 square-root preimages; the lift must itself satisfy the trade/band condition at each level — a per-candidate bounded check); (iii) level-n trades inject into (bottom pairs) x (compatible lift data) — THE INJECTION LEMMA is the one new statement (my pushforward identity is its seed; the antipodal-paired roots branch to the toral/paid side per X24's mechanism and must be tracked — C1c). CALIBRATION GROUND TRUTH: the pilot's exact n = 32 eliminant and the n = 16/32/64 censuses. CORRECTION (roadmap-lane, delta-recursion analysis): the band budget saturates — delta_{k+1} = floor((h + delta_k)/2) hits the vacuous h-1 after ~log2(h) levels, retaining only h/2^k coefficients of information. The '4 levels to n = 64' claim was WRONG. True design: k* = min(log2 h - 1, levels available); the descent is informative and bottom-censusable for h <= ~8-10 (e.g. h = 4: one level, bottom n = 512 with a 2-coefficient condition, MITM-countable; h = 8: two levels, bottom n = 256, borderline). LARGE h (>= ~16) IS NOT COVERED by this route — nor by C1a's direct MITM. If the window audit returns H_max > ~10, a third piece is required: the large-h emptiness lemma (heuristic margin: hundreds of bits; the obstruction count h-1 grows with h). The injection-lemma brief is HELD until the audit lands — its H_max decides the brief's shape. PROVED (Fable agent, D1-D8 chain, 19/19 replayed): exact band budget delta_k = h - ceil(h/2^k); exhaustive case split (the diagonal branch = Q = -P, paid); exact lift characterization with THE TERMINAL-LIFT COLLAPSE — <= 2 lifts per bottom pair (h even), <= 4 (h odd), replacing the naive 2^{2h}, tight in the toys; the injection has a linear-time inverse; soundness theorem with exact k*(h) and bottom parameters; collision exclusion whenever 2^j | h. Validated end-to-end: 32->16 and 64->32 (h=4) recover the pilot's exact toral counts (28/120, non-toral empty); 16->8 (h=3, F17) recovers all 352 trades including 16 paid diagonals. HONEST CORRECTION (mine, again): the bottom census at n = 1024 stops at h ~ 6 (2^38 work), not ~8-10 — C1b certifies h = 5, 6. Gaps G-C2/C3/C4 named in the note.

nodes.title: PROVED (micro-lemma, 5/5): h <= A is the correct reading; 2h <= A is WRONG
nodes.statement: With agreement sets S_f, S_g (|.| = A = k+t), overlap r: the canonical trade is P = S_f \ S_g, Q = S_g \ S_f, so h = A - r; distinct degree-<k codewords agree in <= k-1 points => r <= k-1 => t < h <= A. The trade SUPPORT 2h = 2(A-r) splits across TWO agreement sets and runs up to 2A. Verified via explicit F_101 constructions realizing both extremes (r = 0: h = A; r = k-1: h = t+1). CONSEQUENCE: H_max = A = 67/133/261 confirmed; the beyond-grammar range (100, A] is nonempty at rates 1/4 AND 1/8 (261, 133), empty at 1/16 (67 < 100).

nodes.title: FLOOR CONJECTURE (BAND-DETERMINATION): the rate-1/2 band determination equals the first-moment prediction at every admissible razor row
nodes.statement: FLOOR RE-POSE v2 (2026-07-07, floor campaign; v1 SIGN ERROR CAUGHT SAME DAY before any attack ran — v1 said 'every band radius is safe-side', but the primary docs (P6_RATEHALF_SIBLING.md) show the band is the UNDETERMINED stretch between the proved deficit side (quotient windows, reach 2^33) and the proved safe side (above sigma* = 8,592,912,738); the band is not conjectured-safe): CORRECTED FLOOR — at every admissible rate-1/2 row in the razor slice (log2 q in (255.900, 256), the only rows where the band is nonempty), the band determination equals the first-moment prediction: true counts B(sigma) track the first-moment model through the band (deficit up to the first-moment crossing, safe above), i.e. the WINDOW LAW holds at the band radii — no structural surplus (which would move the crossing down... up) and no anti-concentration failure (which would move it the other way). All three consumers (adjacency_closing, list_adjacency_closing, mca_safe) need exactly the located determination; the 'new priced mechanism' demand is route (a mechanism is how you CERTIFY the band, not what is true there). Pre-registered falsifier: scaled rate-1/2 band-analogue rows where exact counts at band-analogue radii deviate from the first-moment model beyond Poisson, sustained across >= 3 scales — EITHER direction fires it; mechanism failures (AQB, dihedral sibling) do NOT count. Opening evidence: window law verified at every band-analogue probed campaign-wide; both dead routes died as mechanisms, never as count anomalies. | Strong full-determination target: cover the rate-1/2 residual band 2^33 < sigma <= sigma* by a genuinely new priced mechanism. AQB and the dihedral/Chebyshev sibling window are both refuted. A bracket-grade obstruction for some band radius would be a creditable partial result, but it does not satisfy this node as consumed by adjacency_closing, list_adjacency_closing, or mca_safe. | SURVIVAL +1 (2026-07-07, F6-A2, notes/f6a2_fullscale_sweep_modal.py): the composite-family attack channel (nested two-scale quotient stacks, full razor sweep, mpmath dps=40) scores ZERO hits — empty at every razor row. Retained refinement: the band is lq-GRADED (width ~0 at lq=255.900 rising to 2,978,146 at the cap; reach interpolates above 2^33 mid-slice). A preliminary 'band is a fixed-sigma* artifact' hypothesis was raised and KILLED in classification (the swept crossing was the random-word mean, not the worst-word pincer object — sigma* provenance: generic pincer, pro_brief_razor.md). | SURVIVAL +2 (2026-07-07, crossing-fidelity family): 18/18 exact determination matches vs the first-moment prediction across a 9-point q-ladder at sigma = 1,2, including through the crossing transition — the BAND-DETERMINATION floor's location claim verified throughout its accessible regime. | SURVIVAL +3 -> **HARDENED** (2026-07-07): word-class anti-concentration absent (min counts Poisson-ordinary across 60 layouts x 3 q x 2 cells). Families: composite-stack sweep / crossing-fidelity / anti-concentration. | SURVIVAL +4 (2026-07-07, Pro floor-window 6): genuine engagement, no kill — razor arithmetic replayed exactly (incl. an errata catch: our 255.95 band-width log line mixed columns; correct width 1,667,426); the multi-word amortization surface CLOSED as pure averaging (avg > T forces max > T; pooling gain cancels under normalization — 0 bits/fiber net, the AQB pattern); the pincer-at-cap route attempted without result and remains the floor's live open surface. | UPSTREAM DETERMINATION DATUM (2026-07-07, regime map, notes/correspondence/REGIME_MAP.md + nodes/rate_half_band_closure/notes/upstream_determination_datum.md): external crossing-fidelity evidence at n = 2^21 — upstream's four deployed adjacent pairs (KB MCA/list 1116047/1116046, M31 MCA/list 1116023/1116022) are first-moment crossing predictions (C(n,m) vs p^(m-K-s)*floor(q*eps), s = pencil shift) whose locations AND margins (22.197/22.011/3.259/3.073 bits) we replayed exactly by integer arithmetic. This is the floor's determination-location claim confirmed at a scale five orders beyond our q <= 1153 ladders (by upstream's proof, our replay).

Families: complete census / envelope q-stress / adversarial layout-sup. | Pro floor-window 7: no kill (audit-grade); proof lead banked: conditional row-envelope lemma (codimension-drop vs new-component dichotomy) + symbolic K_cell rank certificate as the theorem artifact. | CATCH #12 — COUNT-LAW BETA-NORMALIZATION (2026-07-07, correspondence beta-round, nodes/worst_word_challenger_pricing/notes/f7_beta_check.md, CENSUS-VERIFIED on Modal): at base-domain extension rows the worst word is base-valued and its challenger set over F_q EQUALS the base-row challenger set (interpolation through k base points forces base coefficients — proved + verified in 24/24 layouts at q = 17^2, 13^2: same K_cell, denominators p^sigma vs q^sigma, ratio exactly q/p). The count law must read ~ K_cell/|F_p(D, word)|^sigma (generated field). All banked evidence is prime-row (readings coincide) — untouched. Consumer rule: base-valued strata at non-generating rows are priced by the f1/ext descent at the base row; the envelope's residual claim covers the genuinely-F stratum. || SLACK-SCAN ADDENDUM (2026-07-09, floor_budget_slack_scan): NO FREE SLACK for the envelope without a conventions decision — QA.22 aggregate line at prize rows is 0.9 bits (conservative convention); the 27.0/60.6+ bit within-column staircase room requires re-attribution under the QA.22 conventions note (flagged, not spent). CRITICAL CORRECTION: 'coincidence' = rank defect, NOT equal hyperplanes — the pencil-through-a-line configuration (planes X0 = aX1, no twins, multiplicity n on the common line) refutes the twin-only reading in dim >= 3.

Hence unpaid primitive saturated states number n^{O(W^2)} for fixed cutoff W — L3 via the entropy/Kraft argument. Write-up + the classical apolar lemma pending.

nodes.title: XR minor-specialization certificate semantics

nodes.title: E1 folded kernel certificate soundness

Small swap-distance pairs are already excluded by the proved radius threshold.

nodes.title: e1 N'=256: density bound (WEAKENED from the zero-survivor cert)
nodes.statement: WEAKENED (consumer-tolerance, verified): e1_fullness needs only that non-quotient e1 collisions are o(1)-SPARSE relative to the value set (density), NOT a zero-survivor folded cert. The N'=256 dim-128 {-2..2}-box ZERO-cert is (a) likely IMPOSSIBLE at |F|<2^256 (random model: ~2^48 expected non-quotient box collisions; BKZ inconclusive) and (b) UNNECESSARY: 2^48 / value-set(~2^249) = 2^-201 = o(1), so e1_fullness holds regardless. ACHIEVABLE ROUTE (from e1_fullness's own statement): the density/typicality bound — norm_threshold_ext, split-prime transfer, or a bad-prime union bound — over the admissible prime family. The dim-128 exact lattice enumeration is over-engineered; do not pursue it. (N'=128 zero-cert genuinely HELD: lambda_1=31.67>16.)

nodes.falsifier: a nonzero non-cyclotomic folded vector in the named N'=256 field/root, or an incomplete certificate transcript
nodes.notes: OPEN + HARD (Modal fpylll): BKZ shortest = 18.8 < radius 22.6 but inf-norm 4 (NOT a box vector) -> plain lambda_1 INCONCLUSIVE (cone-restricted/box bound needed, as reframing flagged). Count heuristic 2^48 box collisions NOT confirmed (BKZ found none). Needs a bounded-coefficient box enumeration or a cone-restricted dual cert to resolve certify-vs-collision. | RE-POSED (over-strong, verified): the zero-cert is impossible AND unnecessary; e1_fullness needs o(1)-sparsity (2^-201), delivered by the DENSITY route (norm-threshold / split-prime / bad-prime union). Deprioritize the dim-128 enumeration. | PROVED (Pro W3, verified): bad-prime union bound gives E S_p <= 2^64.2 at N'=256 => o(1)-sparse for all but p^-0.24 of admissible primes. Density/typicality route.

nodes.title: ef_fullfield_bridge (the s6 F1 typecheck)
nodes.statement: Every reduced horizontal component of the extension-fiber incidence variety X with TRIVIAL G-stabilizer, satisfying noncontainment, and not confined to a proper intermediate field, is a genuinely full-field extension fiber to which ext_pole_floor applies. Equivalently (s6_extension_lift.md F1): there is no genuinely-F obstruction of non-pole, non-confined type — the honest typecheck seam where a new ledger column (S9) would otherwise appear. This is the SOLE remaining input to Pro's pole-free cycle exclusion completeness proof; the Galois-descent trichotomy is unconditional.
